title: Adherence logs
description: One recorded or scheduled dose of a medication — the adherence trail the pharmacy space tracks. A row is 'taken' when the user confirms a dose, 'missed'/'skipped' when they don't, or 'pending' while it is still due. The app only records adherence; it never advises changing a dose. Not medical advice.

medicationId.description: the medication this dose belongs to

scheduledAt.description: when the dose was scheduled to be taken

takenAt.description: when the dose was actually taken (null = not yet, missed, or skipped)

status.description: 'taken' | 'missed' | 'skipped' | 'pending' — the adherence state of this dose

note.description: optional context the user added, e.g. 'took with food'

medication.description: the medication this dose is for
